ivschat.loggingconfiguration.destination: The DestinationConfiguration property type describes a location where chat logs will be stored. Each member represents the configuration of one log destination. For logging, you define only one type of destination.

ivschat.loggingconfiguration.destination.Description: An Amazon CloudWatch Logs destination configuration where chat activity will be logged.
An Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose destination configuration where chat activity will be logged.
An Amazon S3 destination configuration where chat activity will be logged.
